features.name: register with explicit reset initialization
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit register declared with an explicit initialization value to test that synthesis tools correctly capture and propagate initial flop states through retiming passes

features.name: shift register with concatenation feedback
features.description: Code should include a shift register implemented via concatenation where the lower bits shift up and a new bit is appended from a combinational expression, inside a clocked always block

features.name: xor reduction operator on multi-bit vector
features.description: Code should include an XOR reduction operator applied to a multi-bit vector to produce a single-bit result, testing that synthesis tools correctly implement reduction operators in combinational logic feeding flip-flops

features.name: continuous assign from register bit slice
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment that drives an output from a specific bit of a multi-bit register, testing that synthesis tools correctly extract and connect the MSB through retiming and technology mapping
